name: crystallize
description: Crystallize your Copilot conversations into lasting knowledge - summarized by AI, saved as Markdown.

crystallize.outputFolder.description: Absolute path to the folder where summaries are saved. Leave empty to use the workspace root.

crystallize.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for the LLM summary response.

crystallize.summaryPrompt.description: Prompt template sent to the LLM. Supports variables: {{date}}, {{time}}, {{sessionId}}, {{turnCount}}, {{firstMessage}}, {{workspaceName}}, {{model}}, {{linearIssueId}}.

crystallize.includeFullTranscript.description: Append the full conversation transcript below the summary in the output file.

crystallize.maxTranscriptChars.description: Maximum characters of transcript sent to the LLM. Truncates from the middle, preserving first and last turns.

crystallize.pickerPageSize.description: Number of sessions shown per page in the session picker.
